global_description: A small, compact bird with a rounded body and short tail. It features a chestnut brown crown and nape, white cheeks with a distinctive black patch, and a streaked brown back. The underparts are pale gray, and the wings are brown with white bars.

part_details.head: Chestnut brown crown and nape, white cheeks with a black patch.

spatial_relations: The chestnut crown covers the top of the head.
White cheeks are positioned below the crown.
The black patch is centered on the white cheeks.
The streaked back extends from the nape to the tail.
The wings are attached to the sides of the body.
